Notes: Lone Star Conference South Division contest.
Four Lady Buffs net double-figures as WTAMU wins its fourth-straight and
seven of last nine. MSU's third-straight loss and seven of last nine.
Game.Officials: Steve Holcomb,  Julie Sharp,  Bobby Bytheway
